chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C.P No.D-601 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.2672/2025 2. For orders on office objections 3. For orders on CMA No.2763/2025 4. For hearing of main case. 30.04.2025 Petitioner is present in person ***************** 1. Granted. 2to4. Petitioner, present in person, submits that at the first instance, he would approach Electric Inspector for redressal of his grievance, therefore, for the time being, he does not press this petition, which is accordingly dismissed as not pressed. However, he is at liberty to file afresh, if so advised. JUDGE JUDGE Faisal Mumtaz/PS
